overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a scenic rural landscape during golden hour. The character travels along dirt paths through forests, past wooden structures, and into open farmland with a windmill visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a forest path toward a wooden pavilion

entered.detail: open-air wooden structure with sloped roof visible through the trees
dense coniferous trees lining the left side of the path
dense coniferous trees lining the right side of the path
narrow dirt path winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense pine forest along a narrow dirt trail. A wooden pavilion structure is visible ahead through the trees, with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with wooden hut and windmill view

events.description: exits dense forest cover into more open countryside
direct golden hour sunlight replaces dappled shade as tree canopy opens

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past the pavilion with a wooden hut appearing on the right side

entered.detail: small rustic wooden building with thatched roof beside the path
tall stone windmill with wooden blades visible on the horizon
open grassy area replacing the dense forest on the left

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit rural landscape as Geralt passes the wooden pavilion. A rustic wooden hut appears on the right while a distant windmill becomes visible ahead. The lighting shifts to warm golden hour sunlight.

events.description: path opens into wide agricultural landscape with expansive fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through open fields with the windmill visible in the distance to the left

entered.detail: expansive grassy farmland stretching to the horizon
expansive grassy farmland with tall grass
cluster of white-barked birch trees along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into wide agricultural fields with the windmill now positioned to the left. Birch trees line the path as Geralt continues along the dirt trail through the open countryside.

events.description: sunflowers appear growing alongside the dirt path
dog appears walking ahead on the path in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the rural path approaching a dog walking ahead

notable_agents.action: dog walking ahead on the dirt path in the same direction as Geralt

entered.detail: tall yellow sunflowers growing in clusters beside the path
large boulder and rocks along the right side of the trail
rustic wooden fence marking field boundaries in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a section of the trail lined with sunflowers on the right. A dog appears walking ahead on the path in the distance. The landscape remains open with scattered trees and wooden fences visible across the fields.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded pine forest into a wide, sun-drenched agricultural landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense trees, where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy toward a wooden pavilion ahead. As he passes the pavilion, the forest opens into a rural vista where the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour glow, revealing a rustic wooden hut and a distant windmill. The scene then expands further into open countryside with the windmill now to the left and birch trees lining the path through wide agricultural fields. Finally, the trail leads through a stretch of vibrant sunflowers on the right, following a dog walking in the distance across a landscape of scattered trees and wooden fences.
